Package org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive

Class KeepAliveReinvite

java.lang.Object
org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive.KeepAliveCallflow
org.vorpal.blade.services.keepalive.KeepAliveReinvite
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, SessionKeepAlive.Callback
public class KeepAliveReinvite extends KeepAliveCallflow
This class manages keep-alive requests by using re-INVITEs.

    • serialVersionUID

      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • KeepAliveReinvite

      public KeepAliveReinvite()

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(SipSession sipSession)
      If Alice calls Bob, this method sends and empty reINVITE to Bob. Bob replies back with his SDP. This method will then send a reINVITE to Alice with Bob's SDP. Alice replies back with her SDP. Then it's ACKs all around and the tea party resumes.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface SessionKeepAlive.Callback
      Specified by:
      handle in class KeepAliveCallflow
